title: Consolidate receipt validation helpers
goal: Reduce duplicated SW-003 receipt validation code by introducing shared helper checks for digest binding, source receipt digests, live-apply blockade and local-only boundaries.

acceptance.assertion: Common validation helpers cover repeated digest and boundary checks without weakening existing tests.
Existing evaluation/status/review packet negative tests still pass.
Refactor does not add live Miro access or live apply readiness.
